allow: PowerShell($nm = "D:\\Antigravity Projects\\Workout Games\\node_modules"; if \(Test-Path $nm\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $nm -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; "node_modules size: {0:N1} MB" -f \($size/1MB\) } else { "no node_modules" })

PowerShell($src = \(Get-ChildItem "D:\\Antigravity Projects\\Workout Games" -Recurse -Force | Measure-Object\).Count; $dst = \(Get-ChildItem "D:\\Workout Games 2" -Recurse -Force | Measure-Object\).Count; "Source items: $src"; "Dest items:   $dst")

PowerShell($src = "D:\\Antigravity Projects\\Workout Games"; $dst = "D:\\Workout Games 2"; $files = @\("jetpack_hero.png","jetpack_hero_fall.png","jetpack_pipe.png","jetpack_bg_sky.png","jetpack_bg_city.png"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { Copy-Item -Path \(Join-Path $src $f\) -Destination \(Join-Path $dst $f\) -Force; if \(Test-Path \(Join-Path $dst $f\)\) { "OK  $f  \({0:N0} KB\)" -f \(\(Get-Item \(Join-Path $dst $f\)\).Length/1KB\) } else { "MISSING $f" } })

PowerShell($src = "D:\\Antigravity Projects\\Workout Games"; $need = @\("hoverboard_hero_sheet.png","hover_idle.png","hover_left.png","hover_right.png","hoverboard_barrier.png","hoverboard_mine.png","hoverboard_drone.png","alley_wall.png","train_orb.png"\); foreach \($f in $need\) { $p = Join-Path $src $f; if \(Test-Path $p\) { "OK       $f  \({0:N0} KB\)" -f \(\(Get-Item $p\).Length/1KB\) } else { "MISSING  $f" } })

PowerShell($src = "D:\\Antigravity Projects\\Workout Games"; $dst = "D:\\Workout Games 2"; $files = @\("hover_idle.png","hover_left.png","hover_right.png","hoverboard_barrier.png","hoverboard_mine.png","hoverboard_drone.png","alley_wall.png"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { Copy-Item -Path \(Join-Path $src $f\) -Destination \(Join-Path $dst $f\) -Force; if \(Test-Path \(Join-Path $dst $f\)\) { "OK  $f" } else { "FAIL $f" } })

PowerShell($src="D:\\Antigravity Projects\\Workout Games"; $dst="D:\\Workout Games 2"; $files=@\("hover_idle.png","hover_left.png","hover_right.png","hoverboard_barrier.png","hoverboard_mine.png","hoverboard_drone.png","alley_wall.png","jetpack_hero.png","jetpack_hero_fall.png","jetpack_pipe.png","jetpack_bg_sky.png","jetpack_bg_city.png"\); foreach\($f in $files\){ Copy-Item -LiteralPath \(Join-Path $src $f\) -Destination \(Join-Path $dst $f\) -Force }; "copied")

PowerShell($p = @\("pdflatex","latex","miktex-pdflatex","xelatex"\); foreach\($c in $p\){ $r = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($r\){ "FOUND: $\($r.Source\)" } }; if\(-not \(Get-Command pdflatex -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\){ "no local pdflatex on PATH" })
